cit.basis: Standard 25% corporate income tax under the Income Tax Act, 2015 (Act 896), as amended.
cit.note: Administered by the Ghana Revenue Authority (GRA). Mining and upstream petroleum operations are taxed at 35%; hotels at 22%. Location- and sector-based reduced rates (e.g. free zones, agro-processing) are out of scope for this SME estimator.

growth_sustainability_levy.basis: Growth & Sustainability Levy (GSL) at 5% of profit before tax for most sectors, 2023-2025.
growth_sustainability_levy.note: Banks, non-bank financial institutions and mining companies fall into higher GSL bands; this estimator applies the 5% standard band.

vat.effective_rate_note: NHIL (2.5%), GETFund (2.5%) and COVID-19 levy (1%) are charged on the VAT-exclusive value and are non-deductible as input tax, with 15% VAT then applied on the levy-inclusive value — effective rate approximately 21.9%.
vat.note: 2025 reform: abolition of the COVID-19 levy has been announced; verify current status with the GRA before use.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
GSL sector bands, free-zone/location incentives, capital allowances, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official GRA guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
